metadata.name: Theophysics Canon Dictionary
metadata.description: Machine-readable canon translation layer for Theophysics equations, factors, summaries, and law-bridge mappings.

symbols.label: Relational bandwidth
symbols.spiritualReading: Relation as the carrying capacity of truth

symbols.label: Maximum revelation capacity
symbols.spiritualReading: Maximum truth that can survive the relation channel

equations.title: Master Equation Local Form
equations.narrative: The local coherence output equals the product of all ten canonical factors, with entropy entering only through the effective entropy factor.
equations.summary: Total coherence is the product of all ten factors, and if any one collapses to zero the output collapses with it.

equations.title: Master Equation Integral Form
equations.narrative: The total coherence output is the integrated product of the ten canonical factors across region and time.
equations.summary: Global coherence is the accumulated integral of the same ten-factor product over space and time.

equations.title: Grace Function
equations.narrative: Grace compounds with receptivity over time and is attenuated by resistance.
equations.summary: Grace compounds with receptivity over time and diminishes with resistance.

equations.title: Moral Entropy Equation
equations.narrative: Moral entropy rises from sin-generated disorder and only decreases when grace performs external work on the system.
equations.summary: Without grace, moral disorder only increases, and grace is the only term that reverses the second law in the moral domain.

equations.title: Yukawa Plus Confinement Potential
equations.narrative: Love behaves like a confining potential: attractive at short range and increasingly binding over distance.
equations.summary: Love binds at proximity and the bond strengthens with distance, never releasing.

equations.title: Soul Shannon Capacity
equations.narrative: A soul's truth-carrying capacity grows with receptive bandwidth and with the ratio of truth signal to drift noise.
equations.summary: As sin noise approaches zero, the soul's capacity to receive truth approaches infinity.

equations.title: Shannon Channel Capacity
equations.narrative: Channel capacity is set by bandwidth and signal-to-noise ratio, which the spiritual bridge interprets as truth transmission through noise.
equations.summary: Channel capacity rises as signal-to-noise rises.

equations.title: Born Rule
equations.narrative: Faith determines the distribution over possible outcomes by weighting which superposed possibility is realized.
equations.summary: Faith determines the probability distribution of which possibility becomes actual.

equations.title: Faith Threshold
equations.narrative: Possibility actualizes only when faith intensity and quantum potential jointly exceed the collapse threshold.
equations.summary: Faith and possibility must jointly cross threshold before actuality locks in.

equations.title: Three Body Sin Decay
equations.narrative: Sin is modeled as a directional three-body decay where state, damage, and hidden displacement all persist in the ledger.
equations.summary: Sin is a three-body process, and nothing disappears from the moral ledger.

equations.title: Moral Conservation Equation
equations.narrative: Moral energy decays under dissipation unless restored by Christ-aligned corrective grace.
equations.summary: Without Christ-aligned correction, moral energy only decays.

equations.title: Einstein Field Equation
equations.narrative: Grace and curvature are paired through the geometry of spacetime responding to content and coupling.
equations.summary: Curvature responds to content, which the spiritual bridge reads as grace bending reality around moral mass.

equations.title: Newton Second Law
equations.narrative: Grace acts as force upon the inertia of nature, pushing motion into a new trajectory.
equations.summary: Force changes motion, which the bridge reads as grace acting on inertia.

equations.title: Faraday Law
equations.narrative: Changing field conditions generate revelation the way changing magnetic flux generates electric field.
equations.summary: Changing field conditions generate revelation.

equations.title: Second Law of Thermodynamics
equations.narrative: Closed systems accumulate entropy, which the spiritual bridge treats as moral decay without external grace.
equations.summary: Closed systems drift toward disorder unless acted on from outside.

equations.title: Minkowski Metric
equations.narrative: The invariant interval stays fixed even as space and time trade off, which the bridge reads as frame-invariant truth.
equations.summary: Time and space trade off, but the invariant interval remains absolute.

equations.title: Mass Energy Equivalence
equations.narrative: Matter is concentrated energy, which the bridge reads as physical manifestation of deeper substance.
equations.summary: Matter is concentrated energy.

equations.title: Density Matrix
equations.narrative: The density matrix retains the full state and its coherences, which the bridge pairs with Christ as the coherence that holds all things together.
equations.summary: The full state retains coherence information rather than just outcome probabilities.

equations.title: Noether Theorem
equations.narrative: Time-translation symmetry implies a conserved quantity, which the bridge uses to ground moral conservation.
equations.summary: Symmetry generates conservation.

equations.title: Soul Field Klein Gordon Equation
equations.narrative: The soul field propagates as a massive relativistic wave.
equations.summary: The soul field propagates as a relativistic massive field.

equations.title: Black Hole Entropy
equations.narrative: Entropy scales with horizon area, showing that information is written on the boundary.
equations.summary: Black hole entropy scales with boundary area rather than volume.

equations.title: Law 6 Shannon Capacity to Knowledge Bridge
equations.narrative: Law 6 maps Shannon channel capacity into the Logos/Knowledge factor: truth from Command survives only through relational bandwidth against distortion from misaligned Will.
equations.summary: Knowledge is truth that survives transmission, distortion, and recording.

equations.title: K as Logos Compression Ratio
equations.narrative: The Knowledge factor measures how efficiently the Command signal survives into the Record, bounded by the maximum revelation capacity of the relation channel.
equations.summary: K measures Command-to-Record survival, not raw information volume.

equations.title: Law 6 Slot Rejection Control
equations.narrative: If the triadic relation slot collapses, relational bandwidth goes to zero; channel capacity goes to zero; therefore K collapses to zero.
equations.summary: A self-referential system cannot generate Logos from itself.

equations.title: C as Global Constraint Manifold
equations.narrative: The C factor is best treated as the global coherence constraint under which the preceding nine factors hold together, while chi remains the output field.
equations.summary: C is the integration condition; chi is the output.

equations.title: Substrate to Factor Bridge Template
equations.narrative: Every bridge should pass substrate primitives through a physical law constraint and output one typed Master Equation factor.
equations.summary: Do not just map terms; route SystemState through a real law constraint.
